Investors
Our investors help us make the impossible possible
01 / 23
Explore our financial results, share information, and strategy for growth as a leader in the competitive semiconductor industry.
Fact Sheet
Annual reports
ASML files its annual report with the US Securities Exchange Commission each year. Explore the results and download the complete report.
Latest financial results
We release annual and quarterly financial results to ensure investors, both current and potential, are kept informed.
Financial strategy
ASML plans for the road ahead. Read about our long-term financial strategy and expectations for growth in the industry.
Financial calendar
Join ASML at one of our many financial events throughout the year, learning more about our place in the industry and how we're growing in it.
Capital return and financing
Read about our capital return policy as well as our current outstanding publicly traded bonds, credit ratings and standby facility.
Share buyback
ASML returns cash to shareholders on a regular basis through share buybacks or capital repayment.
Shareholder meetings
Information and downloads from our most recent AGMs.
Investor days
At our investor days, we keep current shareholders and prospective investors informed about the future of our industry and our role in it.
Share price
Data from our Euronext and NASDAQ listings.
Analyst coverage
Find out which sell-side analysts currently follow ASML.
Contact Investor Relations
Find out who to contact for Investor Relations related questions in Europe, Asia, and the Americas.
Why invest in ASML?
We're technology trailblazers and strategic thinkers, creating value and new opportunities
Learn more
Sign up for news alerts
Related content
Locations
Three continents, 16 countries and regions, 60 locations. Find out more about what it’s like working at a world leader in the semiconductor industry.
Sustainability
Find out what sustainability means to us at ASML and what concrete actions we are taking together with our customers, suppliers and partners.
